_comment: Phase 1 positive fixture for HIGH-1 schema contract: minimal valid plan with revision_mode: initial_create. No active plan exists; iter-1; revision_of and active_plan_path must be absent.
summary: Add a password reset endpoint that issues a single-use reset token and accepts the token to set a new password.

phases.title: Implement password reset endpoint
phases.objective: Create POST /auth/password-reset and POST /auth/password-reset/confirm with token expiry.
steps: Write failing tests for token issuance and confirmation
Implement reset token generation with TTL
Implement confirm handler that validates token and updates password
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint issues a single-use token with 1-hour TTL
Confirm endpoint rejects expired or consumed tokens

risks.mitigation: Use constant-time comparison and uniform response time

risk_review.evidence_source: Single-user password reset flow; no bulk data access.
O(1) token lookup keyed by token id.
Concurrent token use race conditions; must be single-use.
Token must be opaque, unguessable, and expire.
Uses existing token library in package.json.
Standard REST endpoint, no new ops surface.

success_criteria: Reset endpoint returns 202 with token id
Confirm endpoint accepts valid token and rejects reused tokens
All unit and integration tests pass

handoff.prompt: Execute Phase 1 via CoreImplementer-subagent. SMALL tier enters PLAN_REVIEW per runtime policy.
